stem:
The table shows some values of x and their corresponding values of g(x) for the linear function g. What is the x-intercept of the graph of g in the xy-plane?

xg(x)
214
55
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The slope is (5 - 14)/(5 - 2) = -3. Using point (2, 14): g(x) = 14 - 3(x - 2) = -3x + 20. Setting g(x) = 0: 3x = 20, so x = 20/3.

Choices B, C, and D come from arithmetic mistakes.
